insight.headline: Storefront API Update
insight.what_changed: The Storefront API @inContext directive now supports an optional channelId argument as of version 2026-10. This allows developers to apply a specific sales channel's context to an entire query, including channel-specific pricing and product availability. The channelId argument can be used to fetch data for a specific sales channel, such as a web or mobile channel.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should update their Storefront API queries to include the channelId argument when necessary. This may require changes to existing code, particularly in areas where channel-specific data is used. Developers should also review their app's logic to ensure it correctly handles data from different sales channels. Additionally, developers should test their app with different channelIds to ensure it works as expected. The Storefront API version 2026-10 should be used to take advantage of this new feature.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may see more accurate and channel-specific data in their storefronts, which can improve the overall shopping experience. This change can also enable merchants to better manage their sales channels and product availability.
insight.why_it_matters: This update provides more flexibility and control over the data fetched from the Storefront API, allowing developers to build more customized and channel-specific storefronts. It also enables merchants to better manage their sales channels and product availability.

also_worth_knowing.text: Updated App Store requirements: 4.1.2 Use a unique name for your app

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.2
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI now supports non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags and bypassing confirmation prompts in hydrogen upgrade.

updates.title: Updated App Store requirements: 4.1.2 Use a unique name for your app
updates.summary: App Store requirements updated to include unique app names to reduce merchant confusion.

updates.title: Storefront API `@inContext` supports `channelId`
updates.summary: Storefront API @inContext directive now supports channelId argument for applying sales channel context to queries.

updates.title: `productId`, `title`,`variantSku`, and `variantTitle` fields added to `ExchangeLineItem`
updates.summary: ExchangeLineItem fields productId, title, variantSku, and variantTitle added to Storefront API.

updates.title: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components
updates.summary: POS UI Extensions API version 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components.
CLI version 4.5.1 updated with cli-hydrogen bump to 13.0.1.
CLI version 4.5.0 introduces new store commands, including listing and store creation.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI version 13.0.1 fixes issues with disabled command metadata and preserves build errors during deployment.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: Create Hydrogen version 5.0.38 adds an explicit app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: Hydrogen skeleton version 2026.4.5 adds an explicit app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target for observing POS events and running background logic.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners is now required to ensure trust and security in the partner ecosystem.

recap.headline: Shopify updates Hydrogen, Storefront API, and App Store requirements

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen received several updates, including the addition of non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags, the ability to bypass confirmation prompts in hydrogen upgrade, and the introduction of an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects. The Hydrogen developer preview also added new capabilities, such as Storefront API caching for catalog data and WebMCP tools for in-browser testing.

themes.title: Storefront API and App Store Updates
themes.detail: The Storefront API now supports the @inContext directive with an optional channelId argument, and the `productId`, `title`, `variantSku`, and `variantTitle` fields have been added to the `ExchangeLineItem` type. The App Store requirements have been updated to include the use of a unique name for each app, and App Pricing has been updated to include more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative…

themes.title: POS and Security Updates
themes.detail: POS UI Extensions now support discount allocations to bundle components, and a background extension target has been added. Identity verification for Shopify Partners has also been introduced to increase trust in the ecosystem.

actions.text: Update Hydrogen projects to use the latest version of @shopify/cli-hydrogen
Review and update App Store listings to comply with new requirements
Test and implement new Storefront API features
